CREATE TABLE test_punycode (id UInt32, punycode_value String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT punycodeDecode(punycode_value) FROM test_punycode WHERE id = 1;
SELECT punycodeDecode(punycode_value) FROM test_punycode WHERE id = 3;
SELECT punycodeDecode(punycode_value) FROM test_punycode WHERE id IN (2, 4);
SELECT id, punycodeDecode(punycode_value) AS decoded_value FROM test_punycode WHERE punycode_value != 'invalidpunycode-!@#';
SELECT id, punycodeDecode(punycode_value) AS decoded_value FROM test_punycode WHERE id = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_punycode);
SELECT id, punycodeDecode(punycode_value) AS decoded_value FROM (SELECT * FROM test_punycode WHERE id < 4) AS subquery;
WITH (SELECT punycode_value FROM test_punycode WHERE id = 2) AS temp_value SELECT punycodeDecode(temp_value) AS decoded_value;
SELECT DISTINCT punycodeDecode(punycode_value) FROM test_punycode WHERE punycode_value LIKE 'xn--%';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_punycode WHERE punycodeDecode(punycode_value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, punycodeDecode(punycode_value) FROM test_punycode WHERE punycode_value = 'invalidpunycode-!@#';
